message:
test(predictive): tighten free-space sanity gate test to match production scenario

Update test parameters to more closely reproduce the actual production
failure mode: 2 min (not 5) to exhaustion at 73% (not 75%) confidence,
yielding 15.5%/min implied rate. Update comments with the exact math:
severity=1.0 (clamped), required=0.95, 0.73 < 0.95 = gated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
